title: pavonia hotteana
intro: Pavonia hotteana, also known as the Pavonia or Rose Mallow, is a flowering plant species within the Malvaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various skin conditions, wounds, and fever. The health benefits of Pavonia hotteana include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce pain, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Pavonia hotteana can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
